title: Simple AntiAFK
description:
A simple and lightweight Anti-AFK mod for NeoForge 1.21.1.
Prevents AFK kicks by simulating player activity.
body:
AntiAFK is a lightweight client-side Anti-AFK mod for NeoForge 1.21.1.
It simulates player activity to prevent AFK kicks on servers.

✔ Automatic movement  
✔ Automatic jumping  
✔ Automatic rotation  
✔ Simple in-game GUI  
✔ Toggleable with a keybind  
✔ Client-side only  

Default keybind:
O — Open the settings menu
P — Enable / Disable AntiAFK

Keybinds can be changed in Minecraft Controls.

The mod also works with an open inventory/chat/ESC/when the window is minimized.
